evals.prompt: I need to build a new skill for managing our Datto RMM integration. It should pull device status and generate compliance reports. API key provided at runtime.
evals.expected_output: Scaffolded skill directory with SKILL.md, USAGE.md, README.md, VERSION, LESSONS-LEARNED.md, references/api-reference.md, session-start credential prompt, cross-skill delegation section, and ICCI branding integration.
expectations: Creates a skill directory with SKILL.md containing valid YAML frontmatter
SKILL.md includes Critical Rules section with repo security and credential handling
USAGE.md created with at least 2 real examples
README.md contains origin prompt as blockquote
No credentials stored anywhere in the skill directory
references/branding-config.md exists if skill produces formatted output

evals.prompt: Audit the icci-aws skill against current ICCI standards and tell me what needs fixing.
evals.expected_output: Validation report showing pass/fail/warn for each ICCI standard check, with specific remediation guidance for any failures.
expectations: Runs validate-skill.sh or equivalent checks against the skill
Reports on structure completeness (SKILL.md, USAGE.md, README.md, VERSION, etc.)
Provides actionable fix recommendations for any failures

evals.prompt: We just spent an hour building a Cloudflare WAF rule audit workflow. Can you turn what we did into a reusable skill?
evals.expected_output: Extracts workflow from conversation history, scaffolds skill, writes SKILL.md with procedures, bundles scripts, documents API quirks discovered during session.
expectations: Extracts reusable patterns from conversation history
Creates skill with proper ICCI structure
Documents any API quirks or undocumented behavior found
SKILL.md includes delegation to existing skills where appropriate
Bundled scripts have ICCI header template
